## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy src/skillpod` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] OpenSpec change created / archived if this introduces a non-trivial new capability
